title: Amazon Rainforest Restoration Fund
description: Support indigenous-led reforestation efforts in the Brazilian Amazon. Funds go directly to local communities who plant native species and protect existing old-growth forest from illegal logging and agriculture expansion.

title: Solar for Rural Schools
description: Install solar panels on 50 rural schools in sub-Saharan Africa. These schools currently rely on diesel generators or have no electricity at all. Solar power enables extended learning hours, reduces costs, and teaches sustainable energy use.

title: Ocean Plastic Recovery Initiative
description: Fund specialized vessels and coastal cleanup crews to remove plastic pollution from the Pacific and Indian Oceans. Collected plastic is processed and repurposed into construction materials for low-income housing.

title: Arctic Ice Monitoring Program
description: Fund a network of autonomous sensor buoys in the Arctic Ocean to provide real-time data on ice thickness, ocean temperature, and methane levels. Data is shared openly with climate researchers worldwide.
